(1) 3 " ^ ^ "^'"^W!;" ?ls^4#n?sG»m:"^-?^" 17 ^ wi9-^^'-H^«n [TO TFf. ^-11020/2/2012-^*33] ^. sfe TTra^r ^fj^T ^f^r 4556 GI/20I2 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART H—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1 Oth December, 2012 GS. R. 885(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 87 of the Punjab Reorganization Act, 1966 (31 of 1966), the Centra] Government hereby extends to the Union territory of Chandigarh, the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund (Second Amendment) Act, 2010 (Punjab Act No. 23 of 2011), as in force in the Stale of Punjab on the date of publication of this notification, subject to the following modifications, namely;— Modifications Throughout the Act, for the words, brackets and figures, "The Punjab Labour Welfare Fund (Second Amendment) Act, 2010", the words, brackets and figures "The Punjab Labour Welfare Fund (Second Amendment) Act, 2010, as extended to the Union territory of Chandigarh" shall be substituted. Annexure THE PUNJAB LABOUR WEJ^AREFUND(SECONDAMENDMENnACT, 2010 (PUNJAB ACT NO. 23 OF20]1)AS EXTENDED TO THE UNIONTERRITORYOF CHANDIGARH AN ACT further to amend the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund Act, 1965. BE it enacted by the Legislature of the State of Punjab in the Sixty-first Year of the Republic of India as follows:— 1.(1) This Act may be called the Punjab Labour Welfare Short title and ." Fund (Second Amendment) Act, 2010. commencement (2) It shall come into force at once. 2. In the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund Act, 1965, in Section Amendment in Section 9-A of 9-A, in sub-section (1), for the words, "one rupee" Punjab Act 17 of 1965. and "two rupees", the words "two rupees" and "four rupees" shall, respectively, be substituted. p. No. U- 11020/2/2012-UTL] K.K. PATHAK, Jt. Secy.
